title: Amazon Bird Food Dataset
description: This dataset contains information on bird food products listed on Amazon, including details such as name, price, ratings, reviews, and seller information. The dataset is intended for use in e-commerce analysis, product research, and data-driven marketing studies.
citation: If using this dataset, please cite as: Amazon Bird Food Dataset, curated by Your Name, 2024.

columns.name: name
columns.example: Wagner's 57075 Safflower Seed Wild Bird Food

columns.name: description
columns.example: A high-quality blend to attract a wide variety of songbirds.

usage: For non-commercial, academic, and research purposes only.
